entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A food-feed-crop important for the rural poor in India.

entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A food-feed-crop important for the rural poor in India.

entities.name: FOOD-FEED-CROPS
entities.description: Crops grown to provide both grain for human food and crop residues as fodder for ruminant livestock.

entities.name: RUMINANT LIVESTOCK
entities.description: Animals that utilize crop residues as fodder.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the role and demand for food-feed-crops are reviewed.

entities.name: FODDER VALUE
entities.description: The overall quality and quantity of crop residues used as animal feed.

entities.name: FODDER QUALITY TRAITS
entities.description: Genetic characteristics that determine the nutritional value of fodder.

entities.name: STOVER QUALITY
entities.description: The nutritional value of the crop residues.

entities.name: STOVER QUANTITY
entities.description: The amount of crop residues produced.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced for human food.

entities.name: GENETIC IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of enhancing the fodder value of crops through breeding.

entities.name: GENETIC ENHANCEMENT
entities.description: The process of improving stover quality through genetic means.

entities.name: HERITABILITY
entities.description: The proportion of variation in a trait that is due to genetic factors.

entities.name: SOCIO-ECONOMIC CONDITIONS
entities.description: Factors that must be met for the large-scale uptake of new crop varieties and hybrids.

entities.name: ARABLE LAND
entities.description: Land suitable for farming, the scarcity of which increases the importance of food-feed-crops.

entities.name: WATER
entities.description: A resource whose scarcity increases the importance of food-feed-crops.

entities.name: COMMON PROPERTY RESOURCES
entities.description: Shared resources whose shrinkage increases the importance of food-feed-crops.
